Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Calling Storms]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Calling Storms is a monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms is the Sage of Calling Storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms' power crackles with the hungry lightning of the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms has invested in regeneration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms can regenerate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms uses storm madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms can call living lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Calling Storms is a character capable of regenerating even from total destruction.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
